title: Overall project summary
text:
Overall project summary for the entry-level camera review analysis.
Total reviews: 4170.
Covered period: 2021-10-11 to 2026-03-12.
Brands covered: Canon (佳能), Fujifilm (富士), Nikon (尼康), Sony (索尼).
Topic distribution: Logistics & Service: 1654 reviews (39.66%); Appearance & Satisfaction: 969 reviews (23.24%); Performance & Quality: 883 reviews (21.18%); Design & Portability: 661 reviews (15.85%); Unassigned: 3 reviews (0.07%).
Rule-based sentiment distribution: positive: 4167 (99.93%); neutral: 3 (0.07%).
Model-predicted sentiment distribution: positive: 4167 (99.93%); neutral: 3 (0.07%).
Average sentiment scores: positive=0.924, neutral=0.067, negative=0.009.
Average auxiliary scores: referral=0.016, community=0.001, discussion=0.008.

title: Rule vs predicted sentiment comparison
text:
Comparison between rule-based sentiment and model-predicted sentiment.
For rule-based label neutral: predicted neutral: 3; predicted positive: 0.
For rule-based label positive: predicted neutral: 0; predicted positive: 4167.

title: Review evidence - Canon (佳能) - Appearance & Satisfaction - positive
text:
Representative review evidence.
Brand: Canon (佳能).
Topic: Appearance & Satisfaction.
Rule-based sentiment: positive.
Model-predicted sentiment: positive.
Date: 2023-11-09.
Product spec: R50 黑色  EOS R50【RF-S18-45镜头套机】.
Review text: 产品包装：京东包装挺好的，有蛮多保护措施的
外形外观：买的黑色，怕白色后面镜头不好选
成像效果：第一台相机，还在学习拍照阶段，还没时间出去拍拍，就在家里试了下，效果对我来说可以了，期待出去玩拍更多好看的照片
便携性能：女孩子手拿着也挺方便的，也不重，携带方便
Scores: positive=0.995, neutral=0.005, negative=0.000, referral=0.000, community=0.000, discussion=0.000.

title: Review evidence - Canon (佳能) - Design & Portability - positive
text:
Representative review evidence.
Brand: Canon (佳能).
Topic: Design & Portability.
Rule-based sentiment: positive.
Model-predicted sentiment: positive.
Date: 2023-11-05.
Product spec: R50 黑色  EOS R50【RF-S18-45镜头套机】.
Review text: 产品包装：包装完好，外面有个大箱子，里面还放了防撞垫子，避免撞伤，相机盒子里面也做了防撞保护
外形外观：相机外观小巧精致可爱，适合小女生拍照，用来记录日常生活也足够了
成像效果：成像颜色很不错，看着很圆润，人像拍出来很好看
反应速度：反应还不错吧，整体自我感觉
便携性能：方便携带，很小巧，微单主要就是方便才购买的。用于家庭日常，毕竟不是专业摄影。
Scores: positive=0.999, neutral=0.001, negative=0.000, referral=0.000, community=0.000, discussion=0.000.
